notes: Germany report no confirmed injuries or suspensions going into this match, though Nagelsmann is hinting at a possible rotation with Deniz Undav pushing to start in place of Leroy Sané. Ivory Coast's key doubt is centre-back Evan Ndicka, who missed the opener vs Ecuador with a hamstring problem and remains doubtful, while defender Clément Akpa also withdrew from the squad before the tournament and was replaced by Christopher Operi.
home_scorers: Kai Havertz (leading striker, early Golden Boot contender)
Jamal Musiala (creative playmaker, high goal threat from midfield)
Florian Wirtz (attacking midfielder, unpredictable in final third)
away_scorers: Amad Diallo (match-winner vs Ecuador, expected to start and create/score)
Yan Diomande (in-form RB Leipzig forward, focal point of attack)
Yoan-Ange Bonny (Inter Milan forward, fresh option to lead the line)
